scripts.test: bats tests/ && (.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_inject_aliases.py -v 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pytest tests/test_inject_aliases.py -v 2>/dev/null || echo 'pytest not available, skipping Python tests')
scripts.lint: bash -n init-project.sh lib/*.sh && python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py && (command -v shellcheck >/dev/null && shellcheck init-project.sh lib/*.sh || true)
